ksa_text: Knowledge of database systems and query languages, including relational database management system principles, SQL capabilities, database theory, query optimization, and the role of database architecture in analytical performance.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-K-007 (AB, Knowledge) maps to Data Analyst scope as strong fit. Composite score 0.4142 clears the strong fit threshold of 0.35. Top framework anchors: nice=0.414, dcwf=0.397, ddat=0.395. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within analytics and business intelligence.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4142 for strong fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. Analytics-domain text signals confirmed. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA AB-K-007 (AB, composite 0.4142) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with O*NET 15-2051.00 (Data Scientists), DCWF 411 (Data Analyst) and 421 profiles, DDAT Data Analyst role framework. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4142 with signal across nice=0.414, dcwf=0.397, ddat=0.395 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from AB-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4142, domain AB, scope strong fit. High confidence.
